title: Villanova d'Asti
content: Villanova d'Asti is a town and "comune" in the province of Asti, Piedmont, northern Italy. It has around 5,000 inhabitants. The economy is based on a mixture of agriculture and industry. Villanova d'Asti was founded in the Middle Ages. The main sight is the sanctuary of the "Beata Vergine delle Grazie" Twin towns — sister cities. Villanova d'Asti is twinned with: References. <br
